agentChat.home.composer.placeholder: Start with what you want to do this round. Goals, audience, and constraints all help.
agentChat.home.composer.pathReferenceFal: Please review these files or folders.
agentChat.home.hero.description: Say the goal and Lime will keep going with you.
agentChat.home.hero.supportingDescriptio: Writing, images, video, search, and web tasks keep moving around one goal while preserving context, preferences, and methods.
agentChat.home.toast.systemPathDropUnsup: Cannot read system file paths. Drag files in from the built-in file manager.
agentChat.home.curatedTask.reviewSuggest: Switched to a better-fit result template based on the latest signal. You can keep editing before generating.
agentChat.home.quickActions.title: Quick start
agentChat.home.quickActions.description: Choose a task template first, then keep adding details and follow-ups in this session.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.gener: Help me generate a high-quality image for the current topic, and first prepare a detailed prompt I can send directly to an image model.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.joinN: Organize this topic as a notebook workflow: background, sources, thinking, drafts, and to-dos.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.creat: Help me design a reusable Skill. First define the use case, inputs and outputs, execution steps, and fallback strategy.
Create a presentation structure for the current topic, including cover, agenda, core arguments, case slides, and conclusion.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.front: Help me design a frontend UI plan. First outline the information architecture, key modules, visual direction, and component hierarchy.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.profe: Help me draft a professional email. First confirm the recipient, tone, objective, and the next action I want them to take.
agentChat.home.quickActions.preset.resea: Enter research mode first, then collect information, summarize viewpoints, identify risks, and conclude around the current topic.
agentChat.home.guideHelp.placeholder: What would you like to learn? Try: creating a long-term plan / adding a model / using voice input
agentChat.home.starter.guideHelp.label: Guide help
agentChat.home.starter.writing.label: Writing
agentChat.home.starter.ppt.label: PPT
agentChat.home.starter.ppt.prompt: Help me create a PPT. First confirm the topic, audience, page count, structure, and key message for each slide, then draft the outline and slide copy.
agentChat.home.starter.video.label: Video
agentChat.home.starter.design.label: Design
agentChat.home.starter.design.prompt: Help me design a visual direction. First confirm the use case, target audience, style keywords, key visual direction, and actionable layout suggestions.
agentChat.home.starter.excel.label: Excel
agentChat.home.starter.excel.prompt: Help me plan an Excel table. First confirm the fields, data sources, metrics, formulas, and final insights I should look at.
agentChat.home.starter.code.label: Coding
agentChat.home.starter.code.prompt: Help me complete a coding task. First confirm the goal, runtime environment, inputs and outputs, constraints, and acceptance criteria, then give the implementation steps.
agentChat.home.starter.more.label: More methods
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.title: How do I create a long-term plan?
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.summar: Let AI plan tasks and run them on a schedule.
agentChat.home.guide.longTermPlan.prompt: Tell me how to create and use long-term plans. I want Lime to keep executing, reminding, and reviewing around a content goal.
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.title: How do I add a new AI model?
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.summary: Configure third-party models such as Ollama and Kimi.
agentChat.home.guide.addModel.prompt: Tell me how to add a new AI model in Lime, including provider setup, default model selection, and verification.
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.title: How do I install and use Skills?
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.summar: Install Skills from the store and enable them in chat.
agentChat.home.guide.installSkill.prompt: Tell me how to install and use Lime Skills. I want to turn a frequent creation workflow into a reusable skill.
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.title: How do I add and use project knowledge?
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.summary: Save knowledge from files, the composer icon, or chat results.
agentChat.home.guide.knowledge.prompt: Tell me how to add, confirm, and use Lime project knowledge. I want to save knowledge from the file manager, composer knowledge icon, and chat results for later generation.
agentChat.home.guideCards.label: Home guide help
agentChat.home.gallery.title: Start from these tasks
agentChat.home.secondScreen.label: Lime executable task examples
agentChat.home.recovery.running.title: Continuing: {{title}}
agentChat.home.recovery.running.summary: Background output is still running. Open the session for the latest progress.
agentChat.home.recovery.queued.title: Queued: {{title}}
agentChat.home.recovery.queued.summary: Queued requests are waiting and will continue in order.
agentChat.home.recovery.waiting.title: Needs confirmation: {{title}}
agentChat.home.recovery.waiting.summary: This session needs your confirmation or extra input to continue.
